title: Mob Customiser
description: Allows you to edit and customise many properties of all mobs!
body:
![logo](https://github.com/duzos/mobeditor/blob/trunk/src/main/resources/assets/mobedit/logo.png?raw=true)

# Mob Editor
*Commission*

***by [duzo](https://github.com/duzos)***


---

## Allows for the editing of many mob attributes

- Health
- Speed
- Attack Damage
- XP
- Item Drops
- Effects

### Given in the form of a *custom* spawn egg

---

## Savable 

- All edited mobs are savable and loadable
- Data is saved server-side
- Data is saved on a per-world basis
